content: This is the third time I've seen an old game getting revived in some way this week
First two were Starcraft 2 getting a major patch or smth, and Witcher 3 getting a new DLC

unless its like a turbo busted unit
which knowing rev it probably is

i belive i got him on like 30?

p1 cheng, paper heron, tooth fairy and lorentz

5 rounds is what you need to stack bloodtithe

but naut is one of my most invested units

i dont think im getting her but its good to know for the future

During the event period, playing through stages and dungeons will allow the player to earn Photos.png[Photos] that can be then exchanged in the event's reward shop.

    Playing through the event-exclusive Stages & Dungeons will award Photos.pngPhotos, with an additional reward for the first time clear of the stage.
    The final battle node of Intervallo VII: Mnestic Experience has a much higher Enkephalin-to-Photos ratio.
    Playing through older Main Story Stages and Dungeons for the first time will award Photos.pngPhotos based on the amount of Enkephalin Enkephalin.png consumed.
    Clearing a Mirror Dungeon will award 10 Photos.pngPhotos for each Floor cleared (20 Photos.pngPhotos in Hard difficulty). During the event period, the 'Mnestic Experience Theme Pack' floor pack will always appear on Floor 5 in the Mirror of Names and Spiders Hard Difficulty and, if selected, will award additional Photos.pngPhotos.
        If the 'Mnestic Experience' Theme Pack is cleared on Normal Difficulty, it will grant an additional 50 Photos.pngPhotos upon claiming the reward.
        If cleared on Hard Difficulty, it will grant an additional 100 Photos.pngPhotos upon claiming the reward.

Additionally, having the Event Identities and E.G.O in your Team loadout (even when not directly participating in battle) will boost the amount of Photos.png Photos earned from stages and dungeons.
